seo.title: LangChain Guardrails for Recruitment/HR
seo.description: Compliance guide for LangChain agents in recruitment/hr. Meet EEOC guidelines, NYC Local Law 144 requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Recruitment and HR teams using LangChain for resume screening, candidate ranking, and interview scheduling face heightened compliance risks due to strict anti-discrimination laws like EEOC guidelines and the EU AI Act. Hallucinations in RAG chains or biased tool calls can lead to discriminatory decisions, triggering lawsuits and fines up to $1,500 per violation. Vex provides essential guardrails by verifying chain outputs against fairness, accuracy, and regulatory standards before deployment.

complianceRequirements.description: Prohibits AI hiring tools from discriminating based on protected characteristics like race, gender, age, or disability
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Detects biased language in resume rankings and flags outputs that correlate with protected attributes using statistical fairness checks

complianceRequirements.description: Requires annual bias audits for AI screening tools and disclosure of AI use in hiring decisions
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Automates bias audit logging and generates compliance reports with per-candidate verification traces

complianceRequirements.description: Mandates risk management, transparency, and human oversight for employment AI systems
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Enforces output transparency with explainability scores and blocks high-risk hallucinated recommendations

complianceRequirements.description: Requires reasonable accommodations and prohibits disability-based discrimination in screening
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Identifies ableist language patterns and ensures job requirement phrasing complies with ADA standards

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated Candidate Disqualifications
industryRisks.description: RAG chains invent reasons to reject qualified candidates based on fabricated skill gaps
industryRisks.example: Chain claims 'candidate lacks 5+ years Python experience' when resume clearly states 7 years

industryRisks.name: Protected Class Proxy Bias
industryRisks.description: Algorithms use proxies like 'cultural fit' or school prestige that correlate with race/gender
industryRisks.example: Prioritizing 'Ivy League' graduates disproportionately excludes underrepresented groups

industryRisks.name: Notification Failures
industryRisks.description: Candidates not informed AI used in screening, violating disclosure laws
industryRisks.example: Automated rejection emails omit required 'AI screening used' disclosure language

industryRisks.name: Context Overflow Discrimination
industryRisks.description: Long conversation chains truncate diversity statements, leading to incomplete evaluations
industryRisks.example: Veteran status mentioned late in resume gets dropped from context window

implementation.title: Wrap Resume Screening Chain with Vex
implementation.description: Protect against hallucinated disqualifications in RAG-based resume parsing and ranking
implementation.code:
from langchain.chains import RetrievalQA
from vex import verify

rag_chain = RetrievalQA.from_chain_type(llm=llm, retriever=vectorstore.as_retriever())

# Before: raw_chain.invoke({"query": resume_text})
# After:
def screen_resume(resume_text):
    result = rag_chain.invoke({"query": resume_text})
    verified = verify(
        result["result"], 
        rules={
            "no_hallucinations": "Output must be directly supported by resume content",
            "no_bias": "Do not reference age, gender, ethnicity, or use proxy terms like 'cultural fit'",
            "eeoc_compliant": "Evaluation based solely on job-relevant qualifications"
        }
    )
    return verified

implementation.title: Agent Executor Loop Protection
implementation.description: Prevent infinite tool calls when agents research candidate backgrounds
implementation.code:
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_react_agent
from vex import verify

agent_executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=tools, max_iterations=5)

def safe_candidate_research(query):
    result = agent_executor.invoke({"input": query})
    verified = verify(
        result["output"], 
        rules={
            "loop_free": "No repetitive tool calls detected",
            "privacy_compliant": "No PII scraped from unauthorized sources",
            "bias_free": "Background check limited to professional qualifications"
        }
    )
    return verified

implementation.title: TypeScript Chain Formatting for Disclosures
implementation.description: Ensure consistent AI disclosure formatting across interview scheduling chains

caseStudyScenario.heading: LangChain in Recruitment/HR: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario:
Talent Acquisitions Inc. deployed a LangChain RAG system to screen 10,000 engineering resumes monthly. The system used a custom vector store of job descriptions and parsed resumes through a multi-step chain: extraction → skill matching → ranking. Without guardrails, the chain began systematically downranking candidates from state universities, favoring Ivy League graduates as 'better cultural fits' - a classic proxy for socioeconomic status and race.

Two months in, an EEOC complaint revealed the pattern: qualified candidates from HBCUs and community colleges received 40% lower scores despite matching job requirements. The hallucinating RAG chain also fabricated 'gaps' in experience (claiming 'no recent GitHub activity' for candidates without public profiles). NYC Local Law 144 violations compounded when auto-rejection emails omitted AI disclosure notices.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: After integrating Vex.verify() around chain.invoke(), discriminatory patterns dropped 92%. Vex flagged 'cultural fit' language as EEOC violations, enforced verbatim resume evidence for all claims, and auto-appended compliant disclosure notices. Annual bias audit reports became automated, reducing compliance costs by 75%. The pipeline diversity increased 28% while maintaining hiring quality, avoiding a potential $2.3M lawsuit.

cta.heading: Comply with Recruitment/HR Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Integrate Vex guardrails into your LangChain hiring pipeline today to eliminate bias risks and ensure regulatory compliance.
